narrative:
Sterling Twp township has 3,124 registered voters, with 58.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 33.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 8.3%, a pronounced Republican lean of 25.0 percentage points.
